title: leonohebe odora
intro: Leonohebe odora, also known as Lemon-scented Mountain Tea or Lemon Balm, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its calming and relaxing properties, which are attributed to its high content of volatile oils, particularly citral and geraniol. Leonohebe odora is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and menopausal hot flashes. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe the mind, body, and spirit.
